commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ab33247a64a5c5a64c0b65a917e725880e851518)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a profile scorecard block to QA Lab `qa-evidence.json` for `qa run --qa-profile`, extends the evidence schema/taxonomy helpers, tests profile dispatch, and documents the artifact behavior.

PR surface: Source +281, Tests +93, Docs +8. Total +382 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR finding: the live `check-lint` job reports `typescript(consistent-return)` at `extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.ts:846`, and source shows the preflight branch is the remaining bare return after the PR made other branches return values.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can make the preflight branch return shape lint-clean without requiring a product decision.

target.title: test(qa): embed profile scorecard evidence
target.body:
## Summary

- Embeds a taxonomy-backed profile scorecard into `qa-evidence.json` whenever `qa run --qa-profile ...` dispatches through `qa suite`.
- Keeps per-test coverage evidence canonical in `entries[]`; the scorecard only adds aggregate feature/category counts plus missing coverage IDs for the selected profile slice.
- Documents the profile scorecard evidence behavior and the current smoke-ci baseline.

## Smoke-ci baseline

`qa coverage --json` currently reports the `smoke-ci` profile at 14 taxonomy categories, 214 selected coverage IDs, and 83 primary-fulfilled coverage IDs, roughly 38.8% by coverage ID. Missing coverage remains non-blocking but is now visible in the profile run evidence.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm check:docs`
- `node scripts/run-node.mjs qa coverage --json`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scorecard-evidence.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scorecard-taxonomy.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean after addressing two accepted P3 findings

Note: broad `pnpm format:check` still fails on pre-existing unrelated formatting issues outside this patch; the changed TypeScript files pass targeted oxfmt.
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
